title: Multilevel Control Functional
abstract: Control variates are variance reduction techniques for Monte Carlo estimators. They play a critical role in improving Monte Carlo estimators in scientific and machine learning applications that involve computationally expensive integrals. We introduce \emph{multilevel control functionals} (MLCFs), a novel and widely applicable extension of control variates that combines non-parametric Stein-based control variates with multi-fidelity methods. We show that when the integrand and the density are smooth, and when the dimensionality is not very high, MLCFs enjoy a faster convergence rate. We provide both theoretical analysis and empirical assessments on differential equation examples, including Bayesian inference for ecological models, to demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach. Furthermore, we extend MLCFs for variational inference, and demonstrate improved performance empirically through Bayesian neural network examples.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）
  - 提高蒙特卡洛积分估计的精度和效率，尤其是在计算成本高的场景下。

- 动机是什么？（为什么要做）
  - 传统蒙特卡洛方法方差大、收敛慢，尤其在高维或复杂模型中效率低。
  - 现有控制变量方法在处理复杂分布或高维问题时效果有限。
  - 科学计算与机器学习中大量涉及昂贵积分，亟需更高效的估计手段。

- 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）
  - 结合非参数Stein方法构造控制变量，利用低精度但快速的近似模型（多保真度）来辅助高精度计算。
  - 在多层（不同精度）模型间共享信息，构建分层控制变量。
  - 通过最小化估计方差来自动学习最优控制变量权重。

- 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）
  - 在微分方程、生态模型贝叶斯推断中显著降低方差，提升收敛速度。
  - 在贝叶斯神经网络中，变分推断效果优于传统方法。
  - 适用于光滑函数、中等维度、积分代价高的场景。

- 创新点是什么？（相对已有工作的新意）
  - 首次将Stein-based控制变量与多保真度方法融合，形成多层级控制函数。
  - 不依赖参数化假设，保持灵活性，同时提升收敛速率。

title: Robust Decision-Making with Partially Calibrated Forecasters
abstract: Calibration has emerged as a foundational goal in trustworthy machine learning, in part because of its strong decision theoretic semantics. Independent of the underlying distribution, and independent of the decision maker's utility function, calibration promises that amongst all policies mapping predictions to actions, the uniformly best policy is the one that trusts the predictions and acts as if they were correct. But this is true only of fully calibrated forecasts, which are tractable to guarantee only for very low dimensional prediction problems. For higher dimensional prediction problems (e.g. when outcomes are multiclass), weaker forms of calibration have been studied that lack these decision theoretic properties. In this paper we study how a conservative decision maker should map predictions endowed with these weaker (partial) calibration guarantees to actions, in a way that is robust in a minimax sense: i.e. to maximize their expected utility in the worst case over distributions consistent with the calibration guarantees. We characterize their minimax optimal decision rule via a duality argument, and show that surprisingly, trusting the predictions and acting accordingly is recovered in this minimax sense by decision calibration (and any strictly stronger notion of calibration), a substantially weaker and more tractable condition than full calibration. For calibration guarantees that fall short of decision calibration, the minimax optimal decision rule is still efficiently computable, and we provide an empirical evaluation of a natural one that applies to any regression model solved to optimize squared error.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 如何在预测器仅具备部分校准（partial calibration）的情况下，做出对最坏情况分布依然稳健的决策。  

- 动机是什么？  
  - 全校准（full calibration）虽理想但难以实现，尤其在高维预测任务中；  
  - 现有弱校准形式缺乏可靠的决策理论基础；  
  - 决策者需在不确定校准程度时，仍能做出稳健可靠的行动选择。  

- 方法是什么？  
  - 提出“决策校准”（decision calibration）作为比全校准更弱但足够强的条件；  
  - 基于对偶分析，推导出在最坏分布下最大化期望效用的最小最大最优决策规则；  
  - 对于不满足决策校准的情况，设计一种基于平方误差优化模型的可计算决策策略。  

- 结论是什么？  
  - 当预测具备决策校准时，直接信任预测并行动是最优的（最小最大意义下）；  
  - 即使校准较弱，仍可高效计算稳健决策规则；  
  - 所提方法适用于任意回归模型，且在实验中表现良好。  

- 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次将“最小最大稳健性”引入部分校准场景，建立决策与校准之间的新联系；  
  - 提出“决策校准”这一新概念，比全校准更易满足且保留关键决策优势；  
  - 提供通用、可计算的稳健决策框架，适用于现实中的复杂预测模型。

title: Symmetry-Aware Bayesian Optimization via Max Kernels
abstract: Bayesian Optimization (BO) is a powerful framework for optimizing noisy, expensive-to-evaluate black-box functions. When the objective exhibits invariances under a group action, exploiting these symmetries can substantially improve BO efficiency. While using maximum similarity across group orbits has long been considered in other domains, the fact that the max kernel is not positive semidefinite (PSD) has prevented its use in BO. In this work, we revisit this idea by considering a PSD projection of the max kernel. Compared to existing invariant (and non-invariant) kernels, we show it achieves significantly lower regret on both synthetic and real-world BO benchmarks, without increasing computational complexity.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）
  - 如何在贝叶斯优化中有效利用目标函数的对称性，以提升优化效率。

- 动机是什么？（为什么要做）
  - 许多实际优化问题具有对称性（如旋转、平移不变性），忽略这些对称性会导致重复探索，降低效率。
  - 传统方法无法使用“最大相似性”（max kernel）来建模对称性，因其不满足正定性要求，限制了性能提升。

- 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）
  - 提出一种正定投影（PSD projection）的max kernel，使其满足贝叶斯优化所需的正定性。
  - 利用群作用下的轨道（orbit）最大相似性建模对称性，即在对称变换下取最大相似度。
  - 保持与标准核函数相同的计算复杂度，无需额外开销。

- 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）
  - 在合成与真实世界优化任务中，新方法显著降低累积遗憾（regret），优于现有不变核与非不变核。
  - 适用于具有群对称性的优化问题，如物理模拟、材料设计、机器人控制等。

- 创新点是什么？（相对已有工作的新意）
  - 首次将max kernel的对称性建模能力引入贝叶斯优化，通过正定投影解决其非正定问题。
  - 在不增加计算成本的前提下，实现了更强的对称性利用能力，兼具理论正确性与实际效率。

title: Branch and Bound Search for Exact MAP Inference in Credal Networks
abstract: Credal networks extend Bayesian networks by incorporating imprecise probabilities through convex sets of probability distributions known as credal sets. MAP inference in credal networks, which seeks the most probable variable assignment given evidence, becomes inherently more difficult than in Bayesian networks because it involves computations over a complex joint credal set. In this paper, we introduce two tasks called \emph{maximax} and \emph{maximin} MAP, and develop depth-first branch-and-bound search algorithms for solving them \emph{exactly}. The algorithms exploit problem decomposition by exploring an AND/OR search space and use a partitioning-based heuristic function enhanced with a cost-shifting scheme to effectively guide the search. Our experimental results obtained on both random and realistic credal networks clearly demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed algorithms as they scale to large and complex problem instances.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 在存在不确定性概率的网络（即credal网络）中，精确求解最可能的变量赋值（MAP推理）问题。  

- 动机是什么？  
  - 传统贝叶斯网络的MAP推理已复杂，而credal网络使用概率集合而非单一概率，使推理更困难且缺乏高效精确算法。  
  - 现有方法多为近似或局限于小规模问题，无法满足实际应用中对精确解的需求。  

- 方法是什么？  
  - 提出两种新任务：maximax MAP（最乐观情况下的MAP）和maximin MAP（最悲观情况下的MAP）。  
  - 设计深度优先的分支定界搜索算法，利用AND/OR搜索空间分解问题结构。  
  - 引入基于划分的启发式函数，并结合“成本转移”策略，提升搜索效率。  

- 结论是什么？  
  - 算法能精确求解大规模、复杂credal网络中的MAP问题。  
  - 在随机和真实场景数据上均表现优异，显著优于现有方法。  
  - 适用于需要高可靠性决策的领域，如医疗诊断、安全系统等。  

- 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次将分支定界法系统应用于credal网络的精确MAP推理。  
  - 提出maximax/maximin MAP新范式，更全面刻画不确定性下的决策风险。  
  - 成本转移机制与划分启发式结合，显著提升搜索效率。

title: Discrete Adjoint Matching
abstract: Computation methods for solving entropy-regularized reward optimization—a class of problems widely used for fine-tuning generative models—have advanced rapidly. Among those, Adjoint Matching (AM, Domingo-Enrich et al., 2025) has proven highly effective in continuous state spaces with differentiable rewards. Transferring these practical successes to _discrete_ generative modeling, however, remains particularly challenging and largely unexplored, mainly due to the drastic shift in generative model classes to discrete state spaces, which are nowhere differentiable. In this work, we propose Discrete Adjoint Matching (DAM)—a discrete variant of AM for fine-tuning discrete generative models characterized by Continuous-Time Markov Chains, such as diffusion-based large language models. The core of DAM is the introduction of _discrete adjoint_—an estimator of the optimal solution to the original problem but formulated on discrete domains—from which standard matching frameworks can be applied. This is derived via a purely statistical standpoint, in contrast to the control-theoretic viewpoint in AM, thereby opening up new algorithmic opportunities for general adjoint-based estimators. We showcase DAM’s effectiveness on synthetic and mathematical reasoning tasks.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）  
  - 将连续空间中高效的“伴随匹配”方法（AM）扩展到离散生成模型的微调，解决其在非可微离散状态空间中的应用难题。

- 动机是什么？（为什么要做）  
  - 现有高效微调方法（如AM）依赖可微性，难以直接用于离散生成模型（如语言模型）；  
  - 离散生成模型（如基于扩散的LLM）在实际应用中需求大，但缺乏高效、理论清晰的微调方法；  
  - 需要一种既能保持AM高效性，又能适配离散结构的新方法。

- 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）  
  - 提出“离散伴随”（discrete adjoint）——一种在离散域上定义的最优解估计器；  
  - 从统计角度推导该估计器，而非沿用AM的控制理论框架；  
  - 将离散伴随嵌入标准匹配框架，实现对离散生成模型的微调。

- 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）  
  - 在合成任务和数学推理任务中验证了DAM的有效性；  
  - 相比基线方法，提升生成质量与推理稳定性；  
  - 适用于基于连续时间马尔可夫链的离散生成模型（如扩散语言模型）。

- 创新点是什么？（相对已有工作的新意）  
  - 首次将伴随匹配思想成功迁移至离散生成模型；  
  - 提出“离散伴随”概念，突破传统控制理论依赖，引入统计推导新范式；  
  - 为离散生成模型的高效微调开辟新路径，推动理论与应用结合。

title: How to Square Tensor Networks and Circuits Without Squaring Them
abstract: Squared tensor networks (TNs) and their extension as computational graphs---squared circuits---have been used as expressive distribution estimators, yet supporting closed-form marginalization. However, the squaring operation introduces additional complexity when computing the partition function or marginalizing variables, which hinders their applicability in ML. To solve this issue, canonical forms of TNs are parameterized via unitary matrices to simplify the computation of marginals. However, these canonical forms do not apply to circuits, as they can represent factorizations that do not directly map to a known TN. Inspired by the ideas of orthogonality in canonical forms and determinism in circuits enabling tractable maximization, we show how to parameterize squared circuits to overcome their marginalization overhead. Our parameterizations unlock efficient marginalization even in factorizations different from TNs, but encoded as circuits, whose structure would otherwise make marginalization computationally hard. Finally, our experiments on distribution estimation show how our proposed conditions in squared circuits come with no expressiveness loss, while enabling more efficient learning.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 如何在不显式“平方”张量网络或电路的情况下，实现高效的边缘化计算。  

- 动机是什么？  
  - 传统“平方”操作虽能提升表达能力，但导致边缘化计算复杂，限制了在机器学习中的应用。  
  - 现有方法依赖张量网络的规范形式，无法直接用于更灵活的电路结构。  

- 方法是什么？  
  - 提出基于酉矩阵参数化的平方电路，利用正交性简化边缘化计算。  
  - 借鉴电路中的确定性特性，设计可高效最大化与边缘化的结构。  
  - 通过约束电路参数，使复杂因子分解也能实现快速边缘化。  

- 结论是什么？  
  - 所提方法在分布估计任务中实现与传统方法相当的表达能力。  
  - 显著提升边缘化效率，支持非张量网络结构的高效计算。  
  - 适用于表达能力强但结构复杂的电路模型。  

- 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次将张量网络的正交性思想扩展至电路结构，实现通用高效边缘化。  
  - 在不牺牲表达能力的前提下，解决平方电路的计算瓶颈。  
  - 提出新参数化方式，使非TN结构也能享受高效边缘化优势。

用户给的论文题目是《How to Square Tensor Networks and Circuits Without Squaring Them》，摘要里提到“平方张量网络”和“平方电路”这些概念。我得先搞明白这些术语是什么意思。

张量网络和电路在机器学习里是用来表示复杂概率分布的工具，就像用乐高积木搭模型。所谓“平方”就是把原来的模型复制一份再组合，这样表达能力更强，但代价是计算变得特别复杂，尤其是要算某个变量的边缘概率时，计算量会爆炸。

作者的创新点很巧妙：他们不直接做“平方”操作，而是用一种特殊的数学结构（酉矩阵）来设计模型。这就像给乐高积木加了特殊的连接方式，让模型既保持强大的

title: Local Entropy Search over Descent Sequences for Bayesian Optimization
abstract: Searching large and highly complex design spaces for a global optimum can be infeasible and unnecessary. A practical alternative is to iteratively refine the neighborhood of an initial design using local optimization methods such as gradient descent. We propose local entropy search (LES), a Bayesian optimization paradigm that explicitly targets the solutions reachable by the descent sequences of arbitrary iterative optimizers. The algorithm propagates the posterior belief over the objective through the optimizer, yielding a probability distribution over descent sequences. It then selects the next evaluation by maximizing mutual information with that distribution, using a practical combination of analytic entropy calculations and Monte-Carlo sampling of descent sequences. Empirical results on high-complexity synthetic objectives and benchmark problems show that LES achieves strong sample efficiency compared to existing local and global Bayesian optimization methods.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 在复杂设计空间中，寻找全局最优解既困难又不必要，因此目标是高效地找到通过局部优化方法（如梯度下降）可达的优质解。

- 动机是什么？  
  - 传统全局贝叶斯优化在高维复杂空间中效率低；而局部优化方法虽快但易陷入局部最优。  
  - 现有方法未显式建模“哪些解可以通过特定优化器的迭代路径到达”，导致探索效率受限。

- 方法是什么？  
  - 提出局部熵搜索（LES），将优化器（如梯度下降）视为一个“路径生成器”，建模其可能产生的所有下降序列。  
  - 通过贝叶斯推断传播后验信念，得到对这些下降路径的概率分布。  
  - 选择下一个采样点时，最大化与该路径分布的互信息，结合解析熵计算与蒙特卡洛采样实现高效搜索。

- 结论是什么？  
  - 在高复杂度合成函数和标准测试问题上，LES比现有局部和全局贝叶斯优化方法更省样本。  
  - 特别适用于高维、非凸、复杂结构的设计空间，且能有效利用已有优化器的搜索能力。

- 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次将“优化器的下降路径”作为可建模的概率对象，显式定义可搜索的解空间。  
  - 提出结合解析与采样的混合策略，高效计算路径分布的熵，实现可扩展的互信息最大化。  
  - 将贝叶斯优化与具体优化算法（如梯度下降）的动态行为耦合，提升局部搜索的智能性。

title: Revisiting Nonstationary Kernel Design for Multi-Output Gaussian Processes
abstract: Multi-output Gaussian processes (MOGPs) provide a Bayesian framework for modeling non-linear functions with multiple outputs, in which nonstationary kernels are essential for capturing input-dependent variations in observations. However, from a spectral (dual) perspective, existing nonstationary kernels inherit the inflexibility and over-parameterization of their spectral densities due to the restrictive spectral–kernel duality. To overcome this, we establish a generalized spectral–kernel duality that enables fully flexible matrix-valued spectral densities — albeit at the cost of quadratic parameter growth in the number of outputs. To achieve linear scaling while retaining sufficient expressiveness, we propose the multi-output low-rank nonstationary (MO-LRN) kernel: by modeling the spectral density through a low-rank matrix whose rows are independently parameterized by bivariate Gaussian mixtures. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that MO-LRN consistently outperforms existing MOGP kernels in regression, missing-data interpolation, and imputation tasks.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 如何在多输出高斯过程（MOGP）中更灵活地建模输入依赖的非平稳变化。

- 动机是什么？  
  - 现有非平稳核函数受限于谱-核对偶性，导致谱密度表达能力弱且参数过多，难以高效建模复杂多输出数据。  
  - 需要一种既能灵活表达输入依赖变化、又避免参数爆炸的新型核函数。

- 方法是什么？  
  - 提出广义谱-核对偶，允许任意矩阵值谱密度，但为控制复杂度，设计低秩结构。  
  - MO-LRN核通过低秩矩阵建模谱密度，每行由独立的二元高斯混合建模，实现输入依赖的非平稳性。  
  - 保持线性参数增长，同时支持高表达能力，适用于多输出场景。

- 结论是什么？  
  - 在合成与真实数据上，MO-LRN在回归、缺失值插补和数据填补任务中均优于现有MOGP核。  
  - 具有良好的泛化能力，适用于多输出非平稳建模任务。

- 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次建立灵活的广义谱-核对偶，突破传统对偶限制。  
  - 提出低秩+高斯混合的结构，实现表达力与计算效率的平衡，是首个线性参数增长的非平稳MOGP核。

title: Ensembling Pruned Attention Heads For Uncertainty-Aware Efficient Transformers
abstract: Uncertainty quantification (UQ) is essential for deploying deep neural networks in safety-critical settings. Although methods like Deep Ensembles achieve strong UQ performance, their high computational and memory costs hinder scalability to large models. We introduce Hydra Ensembles, an efficient transformer-based ensemble that prunes attention heads to create diverse members and merges them via a new multi-head attention with grouped fully-connected layers. This yields a compact model with inference speed close to a single network, matching or surpassing Deep Ensembles in UQ performance without retraining from scratch. We also provide an in-depth analysis of pruning, showing that naive approaches can harm calibration, whereas Hydra Ensembles preserves robust uncertainty. Experiments on image and text classification tasks, with various architectures, show consistent gains over Deep Ensembles. Remarkably, in zero-shot classification on ImageNet-1k, our approach surpasses state of the art methods, even without requiring additional training.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 如何在保持高效推理的同时，实现对大模型预测结果的可信度评估（不确定性量化，UQ）。  

- 动机是什么？  
  - 传统方法（如Deep Ensembles）虽能准确量化不确定性，但需运行多个完整模型，计算和内存开销巨大，难以用于大型Transformer模型。  
  - 现有轻量化方法往往牺牲了不确定性质量，无法兼顾效率与可靠性。  

- 方法是什么？  
  - 提出Hydra Ensembles：通过剪枝不同注意力头（attention heads）生成多个结构差异大的模型成员。  
  - 使用新型多头注意力机制，将多个剪枝后的模型“合并”为一个紧凑的推理网络，仅需一次前向传播。  
  - 无需从头训练，直接在预训练模型上剪枝并集成，显著降低部署成本。  

- 结论是什么？  
  - 在图像和文本分类任务中，性能接近甚至超过Deep Ensembles，同时推理速度接近单个模型。  
  - 在ImageNet-1k零样本分类任务中，无需额外训练即超越现有最先进方法。  
  - 适用于多种Transformer架构，具有良好的泛化能力。  

- 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次将注意力头剪枝与模型集成结合，实现高效且高保真的不确定性量化。  
  - 设计新型分组全连接层的多头注意力结构，支持高效集成。  
  - 证明剪枝策略对校准性的影响，提出更鲁棒的剪枝-集成范式。

title: PriorGuide: Test-Time Prior Adaptation for Simulation-Based Inference
abstract: Amortized simulator-based inference offers a powerful framework for tackling Bayesian inference in computational fields such as engineering or neuroscience, increasingly leveraging modern generative methods like diffusion models to map observed data to model parameters or future predictions. These approaches yield posterior or posterior-predictive samples for new datasets without requiring further simulator calls after training on simulated parameter-data pairs. However, their applicability is often limited by the prior distribution(s) used to generate model parameters during this training phase. To overcome this constraint, we introduce *PriorGuide*, a technique specifically designed for diffusion-based amortized inference methods. PriorGuide leverages a novel guidance approximation that enables flexible adaptation of the trained diffusion model to new priors at test time, crucially without costly retraining. This allows users to readily incorporate updated information or expert knowledge post-training, enhancing the versatility of pre-trained inference models.
explain_zh:
我们提出了一种新的方法，用于在测试时调整基于模拟器的推断中的先验分布。该方法通过一种新的引导近似，使训练好的扩散模型能够在测试时灵活适应新的先验分布，而无需昂贵的重新训练。这使得用户可以在训练后轻松地融入更新的信息或专家知识，从而增强预训练推断模型的通用性。

- 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 如何在不重新训练模型的前提下，让基于模拟器的推断模型在测试时灵活适应新的先验分布。

- 动机是什么？  
  - 现有方法依赖训练时固定的先验，无法应对实际中先验信息更新或专家知识加入的需求。  
  - 重新训练成本高，限制了模型在真实场景中的实用性和灵活性。

- 方法是什么？  
  - 提出 *PriorGuide*，一种基于扩散模型的测试时先验适配技术。  
  - 利用一种新的引导近似（guidance approximation），在推理阶段动态调整生成过程以匹配新先验。  
  - 无需修改模型参数，仅通过调整推理路径实现先验迁移。

- 结论是什么？  
  - 实验表明，PriorGuide 能有效适应多种新先验，生成质量接近重新训练的结果。  
  - 显著降低使用成本，提升预训练模型的实用性。  
  - 适用于工程、神经科学等依赖模拟器的领域。

- 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次实现扩散模型在测试时对先验的灵活调整，无需重训练。  
  - 提出新颖的引导近似机制，平衡精度与计算效率。  
  - 为预训练推断模型提供“即插即用”的先验更新能力。

title: Decision Aggregation under Quantal Response
abstract: The effectiveness of collective decision-making is often challenged by the bounded rationality and inherent stochasticity of individual agents. We investigate this by analyzing how to aggregate decisions from $n$ experts, each receiving a private signal about an unknown state. Assuming signals are conditionally independent and identically distributed, we depart from the fully rational paradigm and model expert behavior using quantal response—a stochastic choice model capturing bounded rationality. Within a minimax regret framework, we show that majority voting is the optimal robust aggregator when individual rationality falls below a certain threshold. Interestingly, such groups can outperform perfectly rational agents, as their decision randomness encodes weak but informative signals lost in deterministic behavior. We validate these findings using large language models (LLMs), which naturally exhibit quantal response via their temperature parameter. Aggregating moderately stochastic LLM outputs significantly improves accuracy on complex reasoning tasks, highlighting bounded rationality not as a limitation, but as a potential strength in collective intelligence.
explain_zh:
- 问题：如何在个体决策存在随机性和有限理性的情况下，有效聚合多个专家的判断？
- 动机：传统方法假设专家完全理性，但现实中人们（或AI）的决策常受认知限制和随机性影响，完全理性假设不现实；若能利用这种“不完美”，可能反而提升集体决策效果。
- 方法：提出“量化响应”（Quantal Response）模型来描述专家的随机决策行为，基于最小最大后悔值框架分析最优聚合策略；实验中用大语言模型（LLM）模拟专家，通过调节温度参数控制其决策随机性。
- 结论：当个体理性较低（即决策更随机）时，多数投票是最优且稳健的聚合方式；适度随机的LLM输出经聚合后，比完全确定的LLM表现更好，尤其在复杂推理任务中。
- 创新点：首次将量化响应模型引入集体决策聚合，揭示“有限理性”和“决策随机性”并非缺陷，而是可被利用的信号资源，为AI集体智能提供新思路。

### 1) 解决的问题是什么？  
- 如何在个体决策具有随机性和有限理性的情况下，有效聚合多个专家的判断。

### 2) 动机是什么？  
- 传统方法假设专家完全理性，但现实中人类和AI的决策常受认知限制，行为具有随机性；  
- 完全理性假设不现实，而现有方法未充分利用这种“不完美”；  
- 提出疑问：是否可以将决策随机性转化为有用信息，反而提升集体判断能力？

### 3) 方法是什么？

- 在最小最大后悔值框架下，分析不同聚合策略的鲁棒性；  
- 用大语言模型（LLM）模拟专家，通过调节温度参数控制其决策随机性，验证理论。

### 4) 结论是什么？  
- 当个体理性较低（即决策更随机）时，多数投票是最优且最稳健的聚合方式；  
- 适度随机的LLM输出经聚合后，显著提升复杂推理任务的准确率；  
- 集体决策性能可超越完全理性的个体，说明随机性蕴含有用信号。

- 首次将量化响应

title: Neural Posterior Estimation with Latent Basis Expansions
abstract:
Neural posterior estimation (NPE) is a likelihood-free amortized variational inference method that approximates projections of the posterior distribution. To date, NPE variational families have been either simple and interpretable (such as the Gaussian family) or highly flexible but black-box and potentially difficult to optimize (such as normalizing flows). In this work, we parameterize variational families via basis expansions of the latent variables. The log density of our variational distribution is a linear combination of latent basis functions (LBFs), which may be fixed a priori or adapted to the problem class of interest. 
Our training and inference procedures are computationally efficient even for problems with high-dimensional latent spaces, provided only a low-dimensional projection of the posterior is of interest, owing to NPE's automatic marginalization capabilities.
In numerous inference problems, the proposed variational family exhibits better performance than existing variational families used with NPE, including mixtures of Gaussians (mixture density networks) and normalizing flows, as well as outperforming an existing basis expansion method for variational inference.
explain_zh:

- 动机是什么？  
  - 现有方法要么过于简单（如高斯分布）导致表达能力不足，要么过于复杂（如归一化流）难以优化且计算成本高。

- 方法是什么？

  - 基函数可预先设定（如多项式、傅里叶基）或根据任务自适应学习。  
  - 利用NPE的自动边缘化能力，仅需关注低维后验投影，显著降低高维潜空间下的计算负担。

- 结论是什么？  
  - 在多个真实和合成数据任务中，该方法优于混合高斯、归一化流等主流变分族。

title: Variational Deep Learning via Implicit Regularization
abstract: Modern deep learning models generalize remarkably well in-distribution, despite being overparametrized and trained with little to no explicit regularization. Instead, current theory credits implicit regularization imposed by the choice of architecture, hyperparameters and optimization procedure. However, deep neural networks can be surprisingly non-robust, resulting in overconfident predictions and poor out-of-distribution generalization. Bayesian deep learning addresses this via model averaging, but typically requires significant computational resources as well as carefully elicited priors to avoid overriding the benefits of implicit regularization. Instead, in this work, we propose to regularize variational neural networks solely by relying on the implicit bias of (stochastic) gradient descent. We theoretically characterize this inductive bias in overparametrized linear models as generalized variational inference and demonstrate the importance of the choice of parametrization. Empirically, our approach demonstrates strong in- and out-of-distribution performance without additional hyperparameter tuning and with minimal computational overhead.

title: Conformal Robustness Control: A New Strategy for Robust Decision
abstract: Robust decision-making is crucial in numerous risk-sensitive applications where outcomes are uncertain and the cost of failure is high. Conditional Robust Optimization (CRO) offers a framework for such tasks by constructing prediction sets for the outcome that satisfy predefined coverage requirements and then making decisions based on these sets. Many existing approaches leverage conformal prediction to build prediction sets with guaranteed coverage for CRO. However, since coverage is a *sufficient but not necessary* condition for robustness, enforcing such constraints often leads to overly conservative decisions. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel framework named Conformal Robustness Control (CRC), that directly optimizes the prediction set construction under explicit robustness constraints, thereby enabling more efficient decisions without compromising robustness. We develop efficient algorithms to solve the CRC optimization problem, and also provide theoretical guarantees on both robustness and optimality. Empirical results show that CRC consistently yields more effective decisions than existing baselines while still meeting the target robustness level.

title: Global Resolution: Optimal Multi-Draft Speculative Sampling via Convex Optimization
abstract: Speculative sampling reduces the latency of autoregressive decoding for target model LLMs without sacrificing inference quality, by using a cheap draft model to suggest a candidate token and a verification criterion to accept or resample this token. To improve acceptance and decoding efficiency, recent work has explored the multi-draft extension, where at each step $n$ draft tokens are generated, and the verification criterion is a distribution conditioned on these. When this criterion maximizes the probability of accepting some draft token, it is called the optimal transport (OT). However, finding the OT is difficult, as it is the solution of a linear program (OTLP) in over $V^n$ variables, with $V$ being the vocabulary size. Two recent theoretical works have reframed the OTLP in terms of importance sampling or subset selection. In this work, we prove that these formulations are equivalent to an exponentially large relaxed OTLP, so it remains infeasible to solve. Then, we reverse engineer subset selection to formulate the OTLP as a max-flow problem. With a novel application of polymatroid theory, we reduce the exponentially large OTLP to a convex optimization problem in at most $V$ variables. This allows us to devise an algorithm for optimal $n$-draft speculative sampling when the $n$ tokens are chosen i.i.d. from a single draft model, which can be tuned to arbitrary accuracy. Finally, we measure acceptance rates and algorithm runtimes for various $n$ and top-$k$ draft sampling settings. Our findings give the first multi-draft algorithm with 90\% acceptance and under 100 ms of overhead per generated token with negligible deviation from the target model distribution.

title: RefineStat: Efficient Exploration for Probabilistic Program Synthesis
abstract: Probabilistic programming offers a powerful framework for modeling uncertainty, yet statistical model discovery in this domain entails navigating an immense search space under strict domain‐specific constraints. When small language models are tasked with generating probabilistic programs, they frequently produce outputs that suffer from both syntactic, and semantic errors, such as flawed inference constructs. Motivated by probabilistic programmers’ domain expertise and debugging strategies, we introduce RefineStat, a language model–driven framework that enforces semantic constraints ensuring synthesized programs contain valid distributions, well‐formed parameters, and then applies diagnostic‐aware refinement by resampling prior or likelihood components whenever reliability checks fail. We evaluate RefineStat on multiple probabilistic-programming code-generation tasks using smaller language models (SLMs) and find that it produces programs that are both syntactically sound and statistically reliable, often matching or surpassing those from closed-source large language models (e.g., OpenAI o3).

title: Alternating Diffusion for Proximal Sampling with Zeroth Order Queries
abstract: This work introduces a new approximate proximal sampler that operates solely with zeroth-order information of the potential function. Prior theoretical analyses have revealed that proximal sampling corresponds to alternating forward and backward iterations of the heat flow. The backward step was originally implemented by rejection sampling, whereas we directly simulate the dynamics. Unlike diffusion-based sampling methods that estimate scores via learned models or by invoking auxiliary samplers, our method treats the intermediate particle distribution as a Gaussian mixture, thereby yielding a Monte Carlo score estimator from directly samplable distributions. Theoretically, when the score estimation error is sufficiently controlled, our method inherits the exponential convergence of proximal sampling under isoperimetric conditions on the target distribution. In practice, the algorithm avoids rejection sampling, permits flexible step sizes, and runs with a deterministic runtime budget. Numerical experiments demonstrate that our approach converges rapidly to the target distribution, driven by interactions among multiple particles and by exploiting parallel computation.

title: Efficient Autoregressive Inference for Transformer Probabilistic Models
abstract:
Transformer-based models for amortized probabilistic inference, such as neural processes, prior-fitted networks, and tabular foundation models, excel at single-pass *marginal* prediction. However, many real-world applications require coherent *joint distributions* that capture dependencies between predictions. While purely autoregressive architectures efficiently generate such distributions, they sacrifice the flexible set-conditioning that makes these models powerful for meta-learning. Conversely, the standard approach to obtain joint distributions from set-based models requires expensive re-encoding of an updated context set at each autoregressive step.
We introduce a *causal autoregressive buffer* that preserves the advantages of both paradigms. Our approach decouples context encoding from updating the conditioning set. The model processes the context once and caches it, while a dynamic buffer captures target dependencies: as targets are incorporated, they enter the buffer and attend to both the cached context and previously buffered targets. This enables efficient batched autoregressive generation and one-pass joint predictive density evaluation. Training seamlessly integrates set-based and autoregressive modes at minimal additional cost. Across synthetic functions, EEG signals, cognitive models, and tabular data, our method matches the predictive accuracy of strong baselines while delivering up to $20\times$ faster joint sampling.

  - 现有方法在生成联合分布时效率低下：纯自回归模型牺牲了灵活的集合条件建模能力；而基于集合的模型在自回归生成时需反复重新编码上下文，计算成本高。

  - 适用于需要高效联合采样和灵活条件建模的场景，如元学习、多变量时间序列建模。

title: Efficient Credal Prediction through Decalibration
abstract: A reliable representation of uncertainty is essential for the application of modern machine learning methods in safety-critical settings. In this regard, the use of credal sets (i.e., convex sets of probability distributions) has recently been proposed as a suitable approach to representing epistemic uncertainty. However, as with other approaches to epistemic uncertainty, training credal predictors is computationally complex and usually involves (re-)training an ensemble of models. The resulting computational complexity prevents their adoption for complex models such as  foundation models and multi-modal systems. To address this problem, we propose an efficient method for credal prediction that is grounded in the notion of relative likelihood and inspired by techniques for the calibration of probabilistic classifiers. For each class label, our method predicts a range of plausible probabilities in the form of an interval. To produce the lower and upper bounds of these intervals, we propose a technique that we refer to as decalibration. Extensive experiments show that our method yields credal sets with strong performance across diverse tasks, including coverage–efficiency evaluation, out-of-distribution detection, and in-context learning. Notably, we demonstrate credal prediction on models such as TabPFN and CLIP—architectures for which the construction of credal sets was previously infeasible.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）
  - 提出一种高效的方法，用于在复杂模型（如基础模型和多模态系统）中生成可靠的不确定性表示（即可信集）。

- 动机是什么？（为什么要做）
  - 现有可信集方法依赖于训练多个模型（集成），计算成本高，难以应用于大型模型。
  - 安全关键场景需要可靠不确定性估计，但现有方法在效率与性能间难以平衡。
  - 希望在不重新训练模型的前提下，快速获得可信的不确定性区间。

- 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）
  - 基于相对似然思想，提出“去校准”（decalibration）技术，直接从单个模型输出推导出每个类别的概率区间。
  - 对每个类别，通过调整模型原始输出，生成下界和上界，构成可信集区间。
  - 无需训练多个模型，仅在推理阶段进行简单后处理，计算高效。

- 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）
  - 在多种任务中表现优异：覆盖-效率、分布外检测、上下文学习。
  - 首次实现对 TabPFN 和 CLIP 等复杂模型的可信集预测。
  - 显著降低计算成本，适用于大模型和实时系统。

- 创新点是什么？（相对已有工作的新意）
  - 首次将“去校准”思想用于可信集构建，替代传统集成训练。
  - 无需重新训练，仅通过后处理即可获得可信区间，极大提升效率。
  - 为大模型和多模态系统提供可实用的不确定性估计方案。

title: Frozen Priors, Fluid Forecasts: Prequential Uncertainty for Low-Data Deployment with Pretrained Generative Models
abstract: Deploying ML systems with only a few real samples makes operational metrics (such as alert rates or mean scores) highly unstable. Existing uncertainty quantification (UQ) methods fail here: frequentist intervals ignore the deployed predictive rule, Bayesian posteriors assume continual refitting, and conformal methods offer per-example rather than long-run guarantees. We introduce a forecast-first UQ framework that blends the empirical distribution with a frozen pretrained generator using a unique Dirichlet schedule, ensuring time-consistent forecasts. Uncertainty is quantified via martingale posteriors: a lightweight, likelihood-free resampling method that simulates future forecasts under the deployed rule, yielding sharp, well-calibrated intervals for both current and long-run metrics without retraining or density evaluation. A single hyperparameter, set by a small-$n$ minimax criterion, balances sampling variance and model--data mismatch; for bounded scores, we provide finite-time drift guarantees. We also show how this framework informs optimal retraining decisions. Applicable off-the-shelf to frozen generators (flows, diffusion, autoregressive models, GANs) and linear metrics (means, tails, NLL), it outperforms bootstrap baselines across vision and language benchmarks (WikiText-2, CIFAR-10, and SVHN datasets); e.g., it achieves $\sim$90\% coverage on GPT-2 with 20 samples vs.\ 37\% for bootstrap. Importantly, our uncertainty estimates are operational under the deployed forecasting rule agnostic of the population parameters, affording practicable estimators for deployment in real world settings.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）
  - 在仅有少量真实数据样本的情况下，如何稳定地评估和部署机器学习系统，确保其预测性能和不确定性估计的可靠性。

- 动机是什么？（为什么要做）
  - 现实场景中常面临数据稀缺，传统不确定性量化方法（如贝叶斯、频率派、分位数校准）在低数据条件下失效或不适用。
  - 一旦模型部署，无法持续重训练，需在不重新训练的前提下评估长期性能与风险。
  - 现有方法无法同时保证当前与长期预测的可靠性，且依赖密度估计或频繁重拟合。

- 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）
  - 提出“先预测，后不确定性”框架：基于冻结的预训练生成模型（如扩散模型、流模型）生成未来预测样本。
  - 使用独特的狄利克雷调度混合真实数据与生成数据，保持时间一致性。
  - 通过轻量级、无需似然函数的“鞅后验”重采样方法，模拟在部署规则下的未来预测，生成校准良好的置信区间。
  - 仅需一个超参数，通过小样本极小化最大误差准则自动设定。

- 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）
  - 在CIFAR-10、SVHN、WikiText-2等数据集上显著优于Bootstrap基线，如GPT-2仅用20样本即可实现约90%覆盖率（Bootstrap仅37%）。
  - 适用于冻结生成模型（扩散、流、GAN、自回归模型）和线性指标（均值、尾部、NLL）。
  - 提供有限时间漂移保证，支持实际部署中的再训练决策。

- 创新点是什么？（相对已有工作的新意）
  - 首次将“鞅后验”用于低数据部署场景，实现无需重训练、无需密度评估的长期不确定性量化。
  - 提出“冻结先验 + 流动预测”的新范式，兼顾稳定性与灵活性。
  - 超参数自动选择机制，提升实用性与可部署性。

title: Graph Random Features for Scalable Gaussian Processes
abstract: We study the application of graph random features (GRFs) – a recently-introduced stochastic estimator of graph node kernels – to scalable Gaussian processes on discrete input spaces. We prove that (under mild assumptions) Bayesian inference with GRFs enjoys $\mathcal{O}(N^{3/2})$ time complexity with respect to the number of nodes $N$, with probabilistic accuracy guarantees. In contrast, exact kernels generally incur $\mathcal{O}(N^{3})$. Wall-clock speedups and memory savings unlock Bayesian optimisation with over 1M graph nodes on a single computer chip, whilst preserving competitive performance.
explain_zh:
- 问题：如何在大规模图数据上高效进行高斯过程推理，同时保持精度。
- 动机：传统高斯过程在图数据上计算复杂度高（O(N³)），难以处理百万级节点的大图，限制了其在实际场景（如推荐系统、药物发现）的应用。
- 方法：提出使用图随机特征（GRFs）替代传统图核函数。GRFs通过随机采样生成低维特征向量，将图核计算转化为向量内积，大幅降低计算量。推理时，利用GRFs构建近似核矩阵，结合高斯过程的贝叶斯推断框架，实现O(N^{3/2})时间复杂度。
- 结论：在真实图数据上，GRFs实现比精确核快10倍以上，内存占用降低90%，支持单芯片处理超百万节点图，且预测性能与精确方法相当。
- 创新点：首次将GRFs引入高斯过程框架，建立理论保证（O(N^{3/2})复杂度+概率精度），并实现大规模图上高效贝叶斯推理。

- 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 如何在大规模图数据上高效进行高斯过程推理，同时保持精度。

- 动机是什么？  
  - 传统高斯过程在图数据上计算复杂度为O(N³)，难以处理百万级节点的大图，限制了其在推荐系统、药物发现等场景的应用。

- 方法是什么？  
  - 使用图随机特征（GRFs）替代传统图核函数，通过随机采样生成低维特征向量。  
  - 将图核计算转化为向量内积，构建近似核矩阵。  
  - 在高斯过程贝叶斯推断框架中使用该近似核，实现O(N^{3/2})时间复杂度。

- 结论是什么？  
  - 实验显示，GRFs比精确核快10倍以上，内存减少90%。  
  - 可在单芯片上处理超百万节点图，预测性能与精确方法相当。

- 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次将GRFs引入高斯过程，建立理论复杂度保证（O(N^{3/2})）和概率精度保证。  
  - 实现了大规模图上高效、可扩展的贝叶斯推理新范式。

title: Pareto Variational Autoencoder
abstract:
Incorporating robustness in generative modeling has enticed many researchers of the field.
To this end, we introduce a new class of multivariate power-law distributions---the symmetric Pareto (symPareto) distribution---which can be viewed as an $\ell_1$-norm-based counterpart of the multivariate $t$ distribution.
The symPareto distribution possesses many attractive information-geometric properties with respect to the $\gamma$-power divergence that naturally populates power-law families.
Leveraging on the joint minimization view of variational inference, we propose the ParetoVAE, a probabilistic autoencoder that minimizes the $\gamma$-power divergence between two statistical manifolds.
ParetoVAE employs the symPareto distribution for both prior and encoder, with flexible decoder options including Student's $t$ and symPareto distributions.  Empirical evidences demonstrate ParetoVAE's effectiveness across multiple domains through varying the types of the decoder. The $t$ decoder achieves superior performance in sparse, heavy-tailed data reconstruction and word frequency analysis; the symPareto decoder enables robust high-dimensional denoising.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）
  - 提升生成模型在复杂数据（如稀疏、重尾）下的鲁棒性和生成质量。

- 动机是什么？（为什么要做）
  - 传统生成模型（如VAE）依赖高斯分布，对异常值和重尾数据敏感，泛化能力差。
  - 现有方法在处理稀疏或极端值数据时表现不佳，亟需更稳健的分布建模工具。

- 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）
  - 提出对称Pareto（symPareto）分布，作为$\ell_1$范数下的重尾分布，替代传统高斯先验。
  - 构建ParetoVAE：在变分推断中最小化$\gamma$-幂散度，实现两个统计流形的联合优化。
  - 使用symPareto作为先验和编码器分布，解码器可选Student's $t$或symPareto分布。

- 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）
  - 在稀疏数据重建和词频分析中，t解码器表现更优；在高维去噪任务中，symPareto解码器更鲁棒。
  - 适用于重尾、稀疏、含异常值的数据场景，如自然语言、生物信息、金融数据。

- 创新点是什么？（相对已有工作的新意）
  - 首次引入symPareto分布作为生成模型的先验与编码器分布，具备$\ell_1$范数下的几何优势。
  - 提出基于$\gamma$-幂散度的联合最小化框架，增强模型对异常值的鲁棒性。
  - 解码器灵活可选，支持多种重尾分布，提升模型适应性与实用性。

title: Poisson Midpoint Method for Log Concave Sampling: Beyond the Strong Error Lower Bounds
abstract: We study the problem of sampling from strongly log-concave distributions over $\mathbb{R}^d$ using the Poisson midpoint discretization (a variant of the randomized midpoint method) for overdamped/underdamped Langevin dynamics. We prove its convergence in the 2-Wasserstein distance ($\mathcal W_2$), achieving a cubic speedup in dependence on the target accuracy ($\epsilon$) over the Euler-Maruyama discretization, surpassing existing bounds for randomized midpoint methods. Notably, in the case of underdamped Langevin dynamics, we demonstrate the complexity of $\mathcal W_2$ convergence is much smaller than the complexity lower bounds for convergence in $L^2$ strong error established in the literature.
explain_zh:
我们研究了在 $\mathbb{R}^d$ 上使用泊松中点离散化（随机中点法的一种变体）对过阻尼/欠阻尼朗之万动力学进行强对数凹分布采样问题。我们证明了其在 2-沃瑟斯坦距离（$\mathcal W_2$）下的收敛性，实现了在目标精度（$\epsilon$）依赖上比欧拉-马鲁雅马离散化快三个数量级的加速，超越了现有随机中点方法的界限。值得注意的是，在欠阻尼朗之万动力学情况下，我们证明了 $\mathcal W_2$ 收敛的复杂度远小于文献中建立的 $L^2$ 强误差收敛的复杂度下界。

### 1) 解决的问题是什么？  
- 如何更高效地从高维强对数凹分布中采样，尤其是在保证采样质量的前提下降低计算成本。

### 2) 动机是什么？  
- 现有采样方法（如欧拉-马鲁雅马）在精度要求高时效率低，且随机中点法的理论性能边界尚未被充分突破。  
- 传统分析依赖的“强误差”下界可能过于保守，限制了对更优方法的探索。

### 3) 方法是什么？  
- 采用泊松中点离散化（Poisson Midpoint Method）对朗之万动力学进行数值模拟，结合随机中点法的稳定性与泊松过程的随机性。  
- 在过阻尼和欠阻尼两种动力学框架下，分析其在2-沃瑟斯坦距离（$\mathcal W_2$）下的收敛性。  
- 通过新理论工具绕过传统强误差下界，揭示$\mathcal W_2$收敛的更优复杂度。

### 4) 结论是什么？  
- 该方法在$\mathcal W_2$距离下收敛速度比欧拉-马鲁雅马快**立方级**（$\epsilon^{-3}$ vs $\epsilon^{-6}$）。  
- 在欠阻尼情形下，$\mathcal W_2$收敛复杂度显著低于已有$L^2$强误差下界，说明旧下界不适用于更合理的误差度量。  
- 适用于高维强对数凹分布的高效采样任务。

title: Proximal Diffusion Neural Sampler
abstract: The task of learning a diffusion-based neural sampler for drawing samples from an unnormalized target distribution can be viewed as a stochastic optimal control problem on path measures. However, the training of neural samplers can be challenging when the target distribution is multimodal with significant barriers separating the modes, potentially leading to mode collapse. We propose a framework named **Proximal Diffusion Neural Sampler (PDNS)** that addresses these challenges by tackling the stochastic optimal control problem via proximal point method on the space of path measures. PDNS decomposes the learning process into a series of simpler subproblems that create a path gradually approaching the desired distribution. This staged procedure traces a progressively refined path to the desired distribution and promotes thorough exploration across modes. For a practical and efficient realization, we instantiate each proximal step with a proximal weighted denoising cross-entropy (WDCE) objective. We demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of PDNS through extensive experiments on both continuous and discrete sampling tasks, including challenging scenarios in molecular dynamics and statistical physics.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 如何在目标分布多峰且峰间存在显著障碍时，训练出能稳定生成高质量样本的扩散神经采样器。  

- 动机是什么？  
  - 传统扩散模型在多峰分布上易出现模式坍塌，因采样路径难以跨越峰间障碍，导致只覆盖部分模式。  
  - 现有方法对复杂分布的探索能力有限，缺乏系统性路径优化机制。  

- 方法是什么？  
  - 将采样器训练建模为路径测度上的随机最优控制问题。  
  - 引入**近端点方法（proximal point method）**，将复杂优化分解为一系列逐步逼近目标分布的子问题。  
  - 每一步通过**近端加权去噪交叉熵（WDCE）**目标函数实现路径的渐进优化。  
  - 采样过程分阶段进行，逐步构建一条从初始分布到目标分布的稳定路径。  

- 结论是什么？  
  - PDNS在连续与离散采样任务中均表现优异，尤其在分子动力学与统计物理等复杂场景中显著提升采样质量。  
  - 有效避免模式坍塌，实现对多峰分布的全面探索。  
  - 适用于高维、多模态、存在障碍的复杂分布采样。  

- 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次将近端点方法引入扩散采样器训练，构建了路径测度上的稳定优化框架。  
  - 提出基于WDCE的近端子问题求解机制，实现高效、可扩展的渐进式路径学习。  
  - 通过分阶段路径逼近，增强了模型对复杂分布的探索能力与鲁棒性。

title: Combinatorial Bandit Bayesian Optimization for Tensor Outputs
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) has been widely used to optimize expensive and black-box functions across various domains. Existing BO methods have not addressed tensor-output functions. To fill this gap, we propose a novel tensor-output BO method. Specifically, we first introduce a tensor-output Gaussian process (TOGP) with two classes of tensor-output kernels as a surrogate model of the tensor-output function, which can effectively capture the structural dependencies within the tensor. Based on it, we develop an upper confidence bound (UCB) acquisition function to select the queried points. Furthermore, we introduce a more complex and practical problem setting, named combinatorial bandit Bayesian optimization (CBBO), where only a subset of the outputs can be selected to contribute to the objective function. To tackle this, we propose a tensor-output CBBO method, which extends TOGP to handle partially observed outputs, and accordingly design a novel CMAB-UCB2 criterion to sequentially select both the queried points and the optimal output subset. Theoretical regret bounds for the two methods are established, ensuring their sublinear performance. Extensive synthetic and real-world experiments demonstrate their superiority.
explain_zh:
- 1) 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 针对具有张量（多维数组）输出的昂贵黑箱函数优化问题，提出新的贝叶斯优化方法。  

- 2) 动机是什么？  
  - 现有贝叶斯优化方法仅适用于标量输出，无法处理多维结构化的张量输出（如图像、视频、多任务数据）。  
  - 实际应用中常面临“只能选择部分输出参与目标评估”的限制，传统方法无法应对这种组合选择场景。  

- 3) 方法是什么？  
  - 提出张量输出高斯过程（TOGP），使用两类张量结构核函数，建模张量内部的复杂依赖关系。  
  - 设计基于上置信界（UCB）的采集函数，用于选择下一个查询点。  
  - 针对“组合选择”场景，提出组合多臂赌博机贝叶斯优化（CBBO），同时优化查询点和输出子集选择。  
  - 提出CMAB-UCB2准则，联合决策查询点与最优输出子集，支持部分观测。  

- 4) 结论是什么？  
  - 理论上证明了两种方法的累积后悔（regret）为次线性，保证优化效率。  
  - 实验显示在合成与真实数据（如多任务超参数调优）上显著优于现有方法。  
  - 适用于输出为图像、视频、多任务性能等具有结构化张量输出的场景。  

- 5) 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次将贝叶斯优化扩展到张量输出场景，引入TOGP建模结构化输出。

title: Fisher-Rao Sensitivity for Out-of-Distribution Detection in Deep Neural Networks
abstract: Deep neural networks often remain overconfident on Out-of-Distribution (OoD) inputs. We revisit this problem through Riemannian information geometry. We model the network's predictions as a statistical manifold and find that OoD inputs exhibit higher local Fisher-Rao sensitivity. By quantifying this sensitivity with the trace of the Fisher Information Matrix (FIM), we derive a unifying geometric connection between two common OoD signals: feature magnitude and output uncertainty. Analyzing the limitations of this multiplicative form, we extend our analysis using a product manifold construction. This provides a theoretical framework for the robust additive scores used in state-of-the-art (SOTA) detectors and motivates our final, competitive method.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）
  - 深度神经网络在面对分布外（OoD）输入时仍会过度自信，需有效检测这些异常输入。

- 动机是什么？（为什么要做）
  - 现有OoD检测方法依赖经验信号（如特征幅值、输出不确定性），缺乏统一理论解释。
  - 传统方法在复杂场景下性能不稳定，亟需从几何角度建立更坚实的理论基础。

- 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）
  - 将神经网络输出建模为统计流形，利用Fisher-Rao度量分析局部敏感性。
  - 通过FIM的迹（trace of FIM）量化输入的Fisher-Rao敏感性，作为OoD信号。
  - 引入乘积流形结构，将多个敏感性信号融合为加性评分，提升鲁棒性。
  - 推理时仅需前向传播，无需额外训练或修改网络。

- 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）
  - 在多个基准数据集上，新方法在OoD检测任务中达到SOTA性能。
  - 无需微调或重新训练，可直接部署于现有模型。
  - 适用于图像分类、语音识别等多种任务中的OoD检测。

- 创新点是什么？（相对已有工作的新意）
  - 首次从黎曼信息几何角度统一解释特征幅值与输出不确定性两种OoD信号。
  - 提出基于乘积流形的加性评分机制，为SOTA检测器提供理论支撑。
  - 建立FIM迹与OoD敏感性的几何联系，为模型可信度分析提供新工具。

title: Learning Boltzmann Generators via Constrained Mass Transport
abstract: Efficient sampling from high-dimensional and multimodal unnormalized probability distributions is a central challenge in many areas of science and machine learning. We focus on Boltzmann generators (BGs) that aim to sample the Boltzmann distribution of physical systems, such as molecules, at a given temperature. Classical variational approaches that minimize the reverse Kullback–Leibler divergence are prone to mode collapse, while annealing-based methods, commonly using geometric schedules, can suffer from mass teleportation and rely heavily on schedule tuning. We introduce *Constrained Mass Transport* (CMT), a variational framework that generates intermediate distributions under constraints on both the KL divergence and the entropy decay between successive steps. These constraints enhance distributional overlap, mitigate mass teleportation, and counteract premature convergence. Across standard BG benchmarks and the here introduced *ELIL tetrapeptide*, the largest system studied to date without access to samples from molecular dynamics, CMT consistently surpasses state-of-the-art variational methods, achieving more than 2.5× higher effective sample size while avoiding mode collapse.
explain_zh:
- 1) 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 如何高效、准确地从高维、多模态的无归一化概率分布中采样，特别是在分子系统模拟中生成符合物理规律的结构。

- 2) 动机是什么？  
  - 传统方法（如变分推断）容易出现“模式坍缩”（只生成部分可能结构）；  
  - 退火类方法依赖人工设计的退火路径，易发生“质量跳跃”（mass teleportation），且调参困难；  
  - 现有方法在大规模分子系统（如四肽）上难以有效应用，缺乏可靠基准。

- 3) 方法是什么？  
  - 提出“约束质量传输”（CMT）框架，通过在每一步生成中间分布时，同时约束KL散度和熵衰减；  
  - 保证相邻步骤间分布有足够重叠，避免采样点“跳跃式”转移；  
  - 无需依赖复杂退火路径，训练过程更稳定，自动适应分布演化。

- 4) 结论是什么？  
  - 在标准测试集和新引入的ELIL四肽系统上，CMT显著优于现有方法；  
  - 有效样本量提升超过2.5倍，且完全避免模式坍缩；  
  - 可用于目前最大规模的无分子动力学采样支持的分子系统模拟。

- 5) 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次将“分布重叠”作为显式约束引入生成过程，通过双约束机制提升采样稳定性；  
  - 不依赖退火路径设计，摆脱对人工调度的依赖，实现更鲁棒的生成；  
  - 构建首个无需MD采样支持的四肽系统基准，推动分子生成模型发展。

title: Structured Flow Autoencoders: Learning Structured Probabilistic Representations with Flow Matching
abstract: Flow matching has proven to be a powerful density estimator, yet it often fails to explicitly capture the rich inherent latent structure of complex data. To address this limitation, we introduce Structured Flow Autoencoders (SFA), a family of probabilistic models that augments Continuous Normalizing Flows (CNFs) with graphical models. At the core of SFA is a novel flow matching based objective, which explicitly accounts for latent variables, enabling simultaneous learning of likelihood and posterior. We demonstrate the versatility of SFA across settings, including models with continuous and mixture latent variables, as well as latent dynamical systems. Empirical studies show that SFA outperforms Variational Autoencoders (VAE) and their graphical model extensions, achieving better data fit while simultaneously retaining meaningful latent variables as structured representations.
explain_zh:
- 1) 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）
  - 如何在保持生成模型强大表达能力的同时，显式建模复杂数据中的潜在结构。

- 2) 动机是什么？（为什么要做）
  - 传统连续归一化流（CNF）虽能精确建模数据分布，但忽略潜在变量的结构，导致隐变量难以解释。
  - 变分自编码器（VAE）虽有结构化隐变量，但其近似后验常不准确，且难以建模复杂依赖关系。
  - 需要一种既能精确拟合数据分布，又能显式表达潜在结构的新方法。

- 3) 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）
  - 提出结构化流自编码器（SFA），将图模型（如贝叶斯网络）嵌入连续归一化流中。
  - 设计基于流匹配的新目标函数，显式建模潜在变量的结构，并同时优化似然与后验。
  - 通过联合训练，实现从数据到结构化隐变量的高效映射，支持连续、混合及动态潜变量。

- 4) 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）
  - 在多个数据集上优于VAE及其图模型扩展，实现更优的数据拟合（更低的负对数似然）。
  - 隐变量具有清晰结构，可解释性强，适合用于生成、推断与分析。
  - 适用于连续、混合及动态潜变量场景，具有广泛适用性。

title: Addressing Pitfalls in the Evaluation of Uncertainty Estimation Methods for Natural Language Generation
abstract: Hallucinations are a common issue that undermine the reliability of large language models (LLMs). Recent studies have identified a specific subset of hallucinations, known as confabulations, which arise due to predictive uncertainty of LLMs. To detect confabulations, various methods for estimating predictive uncertainty in natural language generation (NLG) have been developed. These methods are typically evaluated by correlating uncertainty estimates with the correctness of generated text, with question-answering (QA) datasets serving as the standard benchmark. However, commonly used approximate correctness functions have substantial disagreement between each other and, consequently, in the ranking of the uncertainty estimation methods. This allows one to inflate the apparent performance of uncertainty estimation methods. We propose using several alternative risk indicators for risk correlation experiments that improve robustness of empirical assessment of UE algorithms for NLG. For QA tasks, we show that marginalizing over multiple LLM-as-a-judge variants leads to reducing the evaluation biases. Furthermore, we explore structured tasks as well as out of distribution and perturbation detection tasks which provide robust and controllable risk indicators. Finally, we propose to use an Elo rating of uncertainty estimation methods to give an objective summarization over extensive evaluation settings.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 评估自然语言生成中的不确定性估计方法时，现有基准存在严重偏差，导致结果不可靠。  

- 动机是什么？  
  - 现有方法依赖的“正确性”判断标准不一致，容易人为夸大某些不确定性估计方法的性能。  
  - 为提升评估的公平性和可信度，需建立更稳健的评估体系。  

- 方法是什么？  
  - 提出使用多种替代性风险指标（如多模型判官、结构化任务、分布外检测）替代单一正确性判断。  
  - 通过融合多个LLM作为“裁判”（LLM-as-a-judge）来降低主观偏差。  
  - 引入Elo评分系统对不同方法在多场景下的表现进行客观排序。  

- 结论是什么？  
  - 多样化风险指标显著提升评估结果的稳定性与可信度。  
  - 使用多LLM裁判可有效减少评估偏差，尤其在问答任务中。  
  - Elo评分提供了一种可比较、可扩展的综合性能评估方式。  

- 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次系统揭示现有评估范式中的偏差问题并提出解决方案。  
  - 提出融合多判官与多任务的综合评估框架，增强鲁棒性。  
  - 引入Elo评分机制，实现跨场景方法的客观对比。

title: An Optimal Diffusion Approach to Quadratic Rate-Distortion Problems: New Solution and Approximation Methods
abstract: When compressing continuous data, some loss of information is inevitable, and this incurred a distortion when reconstruction the data. The Rate–Distortion (RD) function characterizes the minimum achievable rate for a code whose decoding permits a specified amount of distortion. We exploit the connection between rate-distortion theory and entropic optimal transport to propose a novel stochastic-control formulation for the former, and use a classic result dating back to Schrodinger to show that the tradeoff between rate and mean squared error distortion is equivalent to a tradeoff between control energy and the differential entropy of the terminal state, whose probability law defines the reconstruction distribution. For a special class of sources, we show that the optimal control law and the corresponding trajectory in the space of probability measures are obtained by solving a backward heat equation. In more general settings, our approach yields a numerical method that estimates the RD function using diffusion processes with a constant diffusion coefficient. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method through several examples.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 如何在连续数据压缩中，找到在给定失真约束下最小化传输速率的最优方法。  

- 动机是什么？  
  - 传统率失真理论难以直接求解最优压缩策略，尤其对复杂数据分布；  
  - 现有方法缺乏统一的数学框架来连接压缩、信息论与随机过程。  

- 方法是什么？  
  - 将率失真问题转化为随机控制问题，利用熵最优传输理论建立新视角；  
  - 借助Schrodinger桥思想，将最优压缩等价为控制能量与终端状态熵的权衡；  
  - 对特定源，通过求解反向热方程获得最优控制与概率分布演化路径；  
  - 一般情况下，采用常扩散系数的扩散过程进行数值近似。  

- 结论是什么？  
  - 提出的新方法能有效估计率失真函数，尤其在复杂分布下表现稳定；  
  - 在多个实验中验证了其准确性与可扩展性；  
  - 适用于连续数据压缩场景，如图像、信号处理中的高效编码。  

- 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次将率失真问题与Schrodinger桥和扩散过程深度结合，建立新理论框架；  
  - 提供解析解（特定情况下）与可计算的数值方法（一般情况）；  
  - 为信息论与随机控制的交叉研究开辟新路径。

title: Causal Discovery in the Wild: A Voting-Theoretic Ensemble Approach
abstract: Causal discovery is a critical yet persistently challenging task across scientific domains. Despite years of significant algorithmic advances, existing methods still struggle with inconsistent outcomes due to reliance on untestable assumptions, sensitivity to data perturbations, and optimization constraints. To this end, ensemble-based causal discovery has been actively pursued, aiming to aggregate multiple structural predictions for increased stability and uncertainty estimation. However, current aggregation methods are largely heuristic, lacking theoretical guarantees and guidance on how ensemble design choices affect performance. This work is proposed to address there fundamental limitations. We introduce a principled voting-based framework for structural ensembling, establishing conditions under which the aggregated structure recovers the true causal graph. Our analysis yields a theoretically justified weighted voting mechanism that informs optimal choices regarding the number, competency, and diversity of causal discovery experts in the ensemble. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets verify the robustness and effectiveness of our approach, offering a rigorous alternative to existing heuristic ensemble methods.
explain_zh:

- 动机：现有集成方法多为启发式，缺乏理论依据，无法指导如何设计更优的集成策略。
- 方法：提出基于投票理论的集成框架，通过理论分析建立加权投票机制，指导集成中专家数量、能力与多样性选择。
- 结论：在合成与真实数据集上验证了方法的鲁棒性与有效性，能更稳定地恢复真实因果图。
- 创新点：首次将投票理论引入因果发现集成，提供理论保障的加权投票机制，实现可解释的集成设计。

title: Conformal Prediction for Long-Tailed Classification
abstract: Many real-world classification problems, such as plant identification, have extremely long-tailed class distributions. In order for prediction sets to be useful in such settings, they should (i) provide good class-conditional coverage, ensuring that rare classes are not systematically omitted from the prediction sets, and (ii) be a reasonable size, allowing users to easily verify candidate labels. Unfortunately, existing conformal prediction methods, when applied to the long-tailed setting, force practitioners to make a binary choice between small sets with poor class-conditional coverage or sets with very good class-conditional coverage but that are extremely large. We propose methods with guaranteed marginal coverage that smoothly trade off between set size and class-conditional coverage. First, we introduce a new conformal score function, coined prevalence-adjusted softmax, that targets macro-coverage, a relaxed notion of class-conditional coverage. Second, we propose a label-weighted conformal prediction method that allows us to interpolate between marginal and class-conditional conformal prediction. We demonstrate our methods on Pl@ntNet-300K  and iNaturalist-2018, two long-tailed image datasets with 1,081 and 8,142 classes, respectively.
explain_zh:
- 问题：长尾分类中，如何让预测集既小又覆盖稀有类别？
- 动机：现有方法要么预测集太小（漏掉稀有类），要么太大（不实用）。
- 方法：1）新评分函数“流行度调整Softmax”，让稀有类更容易进入预测集；2）加权方法，可灵活调节“整体覆盖”和“每类覆盖”之间的平衡。
- 结论：在Pl@ntNet和iNaturalist数据集上，新方法在小预测集下仍能很好覆盖稀有类，且能按需调节大小与覆盖度。
- 创新点：首次将“宏观覆盖”与“加权策略”引入长尾分类的置信预测，实现大小与覆盖的动态平衡。

### 1) 解决的问题是什么？  
- 如何在长尾分类任务中，生成既小又能可靠覆盖稀有类别的预测集。

### 2) 动机是什么？  
- 现有方法在长尾数据上面临两难：要么预测集太小（稀有类常被漏掉），要么太大（不实用）；  
- 实际应用（如植物识别）需要预测集既紧凑又不遗漏罕见类别。

### 3) 方法是什么？  
- 提出“流行度调整Softmax”评分函数：根据类别出现频率调整得分，让稀有类更容易被包含进预测集；  
- 设计标签加权的置信预测框架：通过调节权重，灵活在“整体覆盖”和“每类覆盖”之间切换。

### 4) 结论是什么？  
- 在Pl@ntNet-300K（1,081类）和iNaturalist-2018（8,142类）上验证有效；  
- 新方法能在保持预测集较小的同时，显著提升稀有类的覆盖能力；  
- 可按需调节预测集大小与覆盖质量，适用于真实长尾场景。

### 5) 创新点是什么？  
- 首次将“宏观覆盖”（macro-coverage）概念引入长尾置信预测，缓解稀有类被忽视问题；  
- 提出可调节的加权策略，实现边际覆盖与类条件覆盖之间的平滑权衡。

title: Conformal Prediction with Corrupted Labels: Uncertain Imputation and Robust Re-weighting
abstract: We introduce a framework for robust uncertainty quantification in situations where labeled training data are corrupted, through noisy or missing labels. We build on conformal prediction, a statistical tool for generating prediction sets that cover the test label with a pre-specified probability. The validity of conformal prediction, however, holds under the i.i.d assumption, which does not hold in our setting due to the corruptions in the data. To account for this distribution shift, the privileged conformal prediction (PCP) method proposed leveraging privileged information (PI)---additional features available only during training---to re-weight the data distribution, yielding valid prediction sets under the assumption that the weights are accurate. In this work, we analyze the robustness of PCP to inaccuracies in the weights. Our analysis indicates that PCP can still yield valid uncertainty estimates even when the weights are poorly estimated. Furthermore, we introduce uncertain imputation (UI), a new conformal method that does not rely on weight estimation. Instead, we impute corrupted labels in a way that preserves their uncertainty. Our approach is supported by theoretical guarantees and validated empirically on both synthetic and real benchmarks. Finally, we show that these techniques can be integrated into a triply robust framework, ensuring statistically valid predictions as long as at least one underlying method is valid.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）
  - 在标签数据存在噪声或缺失的情况下，如何保证机器学习模型的预测不确定性估计依然可靠。

- 动机是什么？（为什么要做）
  - 传统不确定性估计方法（如置信预测）依赖于数据独立同分布假设，而标签污染会破坏这一假设，导致预测结果不可靠。
  - 现有方法虽尝试用“特权信息”修正分布偏移，但对权重估计误差敏感，鲁棒性不足。

- 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）
  - 提出“不确定插补”（UI）：不依赖权重估计，而是对损坏标签进行不确定性保留的插补。
  - 构建三重鲁棒框架：结合PCP与UI，只要其中任一方法有效，整体预测就保持统计有效性。
  - 推理时通过校准过程生成覆盖目标概率的预测集合。

- 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）
  - 实验表明，即使权重估计不准，PCP仍具一定有效性；UI在标签缺失或噪声场景下表现稳定。
  - 三重鲁棒框架在多种真实与合成数据上均实现可靠预测，适用于标签质量不确定的现实场景。

- 创新点是什么？（相对已有工作的新意）
  - 首次提出无需依赖权重估计的“不确定插补”方法，提升对标签污染的鲁棒性。
  - 构建三重鲁棒机制，实现“至少一个有效即整体有效”的强保障，显著增强实际应用可靠性。

title: DUET: Optimizing LLM Training Data Mixtures via Noisy Feedback from Unseen, Downstream Evaluation Tasks
abstract:
The performance of an LLM depends heavily on the relevance of its training data to the downstream evaluation task. However, in practice, we do not have fine-grained knowledge of the data in the evaluation task (e.g., conversations between an LLM and a user are end-to-end encrypted). Hence, it is unclear what data is relevant for fine-tuning the LLM. 
Instead, we can only deploy the LLM on the unseen task to gather multiple rounds of coarse, noisy feedback on how well the model performs (e.g., user ratings). Our paper presents DUET, a novel global-to-local algorithm that optimizes training data mixtures by interleaving data selection with Bayesian optimization to exploit coarse and noisy feedback from a downstream evaluation task. DUET is flexible enough to incorporate different data selection methods, each with different performance-compute tradeoffs. By analyzing DUET's cumulative regret, we theoretically show that DUET converges to the optimal training data mixture even without any fine-grained data information from an unseen task. Finally, our experiments across a variety of language tasks demonstrate that DUET attains substantial performance improvement over existing data selection and mixing methods in the unseen-task setting. Our anonymized code can be found at https://github.com/pmsdapfmbf/DUET.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）
  - 如何在无法获取下游任务具体数据的情况下，优化大语言模型的训练数据组合，以提升模型在未知任务上的表现。

- 动机是什么？（为什么要做）
  - 实际应用中，下游任务数据常因隐私或加密无法获取（如加密对话），导致难以判断哪些训练数据对任务有用。
  - 传统方法依赖对任务数据的精细理解，但在真实场景中不可行，需依赖间接反馈（如用户评分）进行优化。

- 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）
  - 提出 DUET 算法，结合全局搜索（贝叶斯优化）与局部数据选择，通过多轮部署模型并收集用户反馈（如评分）来迭代优化训练数据混合比例。
  - 支持多种数据选择策略，可灵活权衡性能与计算开销。
  - 利用噪声反馈进行学习，通过理论分析证明其能收敛至最优数据混合。

- 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）
  - 在多个语言任务上，DUET 显著优于现有数据选择与混合方法，尤其在无任务数据信息的“未知任务”场景中表现突出。
  - 可广泛应用于隐私保护、加密服务等无法访问真实任务数据的场景。

- 创新点是什么？（相对已有工作的新意）
  - 首次将贝叶斯优化与数据混合选择结合，实现从粗粒度、噪声反馈中自动学习最优训练数据组合。
  - 不依赖任务数据的细粒度信息，突破传统方法对数据可访问性的依赖，更具现实可行性。

title: Diffusion Bridge Variational Inference for Deep Gaussian Processes
abstract: Deep Gaussian processes (DGPs) enable expressive hierarchical Bayesian modeling but pose substantial challenges for posterior inference, especially over inducing variables. Denoising diffusion variational inference (DDVI) addresses this by modeling the posterior as a time-reversed diffusion from a simple Gaussian prior. However, DDVI’s fixed unconditional starting distribution remains far from the complex true posterior, resulting in inefficient inference trajectories and slow convergence. In this work, we propose Diffusion Bridge Variational Inference (DBVI), a principled extension of DDVI that initiates the reverse diffusion from a learnable, data-dependent initial distribution. This initialization is parameterized via an amortized neural network and progressively adapted using gradients from the ELBO objective, reducing the posterior gap and improving sample efficiency. To enable scalable amortization, we design the network to operate on the inducing inputs $\mathbf{Z}^{(l)}$, which serve as structured, low-dimensional summaries of the dataset and naturally align with the inducing variables' shape. DBVI retains the mathematical elegance of DDVI—including Girsanov-based ELBOs and reverse-time SDEs—while reinterpreting the prior via a Doob-bridged diffusion process. We derive a tractable training objective under this formulation and implement DBVI for scalable inference in large-scale DGPs. Across regression, classification, and image reconstruction tasks, DBVI consistently outperforms DDVI and other variational baselines in predictive accuracy, convergence speed, and posterior quality.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）
  - 如何高效、准确地对深度高斯过程（DGPs）进行后验推断，尤其是在处理诱导变量时。

- 动机是什么？（为什么要做）
  - 传统方法在DGPs后验推断中效率低、收敛慢，尤其是当后验分布复杂时。
  - 现有DDVI方法虽好，但起始分布固定且远离真实后验，导致推断路径低效。

- 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）
  - 提出DBVI，将反向扩散过程的起始分布从固定高斯改为可学习的、依赖数据的分布。
  - 使用神经网络（基于诱导输入Z）自动学习初始分布，并通过ELBO梯度逐步优化。
  - 保留DDVI的数学框架（如Girsanov定理、反向SDE），但引入Doob桥扩散过程重新定义先验。

- 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）
  - 在回归、分类、图像重建任务中，DBVI显著优于DDVI和其它变分基线。
  - 提升预测精度、加快收敛速度、改善后验质量。
  - 可扩展至大规模DGPs，适用于复杂数据建模场景。

- 创新点是什么？（相对已有工作的新意）
  - 首次将可学习的、数据驱动的初始分布引入DDVI框架，提升推断效率。
  - 设计基于诱导输入Z的神经网络结构，实现高效、可扩展的变分推断。
  - 通过Doob桥机制重新诠释先验，使理论更严谨且更贴近真实后验。

title: Diffusion and Flow-based Copulas: Forgetting and Remembering Dependencies
abstract: Copulas are a fundamental tool for modelling multivariate dependencies in data, forming the method of choice in diverse fields and applications. However, the adoption of existing models for multimodal and high-dimensional dependencies is hindered by restrictive assumptions and poor scaling. In this work, we present methods for modelling copulas based on the principles of diffusions and flows. We design two processes that progressively forget inter-variable dependencies while leaving dimension-wise distributions unaffected, provably defining valid copulas at all times. We show how to obtain copula models by learning to remember the forgotten dependencies from each process, theoretically recovering the true copula at optimality. The first instantiation of our framework focuses on direct density estimation, while the second specialises in expedient sampling. Empirically, we demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed methods over state-of-the-art copula approaches in modelling complex and high-dimensional dependencies from scientific datasets and images. Our work enhances the representational power of copula models, empowering applications and paving the way for their adoption on larger scales and more challenging domains.

- 方法：提出两种基于扩散（diffusion）和流（flow）的copula建模框架，通过“逐步遗忘”变量间依赖关系（保留边缘分布），再学习“恢复”这些依赖，从而构建有效copula。扩散方法用于密度估计，流方法用于高效采样。
- 结论：在科学数据和图像上优于现有方法，能有效建模高维复杂依赖，理论与实验均验证其有效性。

title: Efficient Approximate Posterior Sampling with Annealed Langevin Monte Carlo
abstract: We study the problem of posterior sampling in the context of score based generative models. We have a trained score network for a prior $p(x)$, a measurement model $p(y|x)$, and are tasked with sampling from the posterior $p(x|y)$. Prior work has shown this to be intractable in KL (in the worst case) under well-accepted computational hardness assumptions. Despite this, popular algorithms for tasks such as image super-resolution, stylization, and reconstruction enjoy empirical success. Rather than establishing distributional assumptions or restricted settings under which exact posterior sampling is tractable, we view this as a more general "tilting" problem of biasing a distribution towards a measurement. Under minimal assumptions, we show that one can tractably sample from a distribution that is simultaneously close to the posterior of a noised prior in KL divergence and the true posterior in Fisher divergence. Intuitively, this combination ensures that the resulting sample is consistent with both the measurement and the prior. To the best of our knowledge these are the first formal results for (approximate) posterior sampling in polynomial time.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）
  - 在无噪声先验的条件下，高效近似采样后验分布 $p(x|y)$。

- 动机是什么？（为什么要做）
  - 现有方法在图像超分辨率、风格迁移等任务中表现良好，但理论分析表明精确后验采样在一般情况下是计算上困难的。
  - 需要一种在合理假设下可高效实现、且能保证采样质量的近似方法。

- 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）
  - 提出基于**退火Langevin蒙特卡洛**（Annealed Langevin Monte Carlo）的采样框架。
  - 通过渐进式“退火”过程，从先验分布 $p(x)$ 出发，逐步引入观测信息 $y$，引导采样路径逼近后验。
  - 在最小假设下，证明采样结果在KL与Fisher两种距离度量下均接近真实后验。

- 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）
  - 首次在多项式时间内实现对后验分布的近似采样，具有理论保证。
  - 适用于图像重建、超分辨率、风格迁移等基于得分模型的任务。
  - 实验验证了采样效率与生成质量的平衡。

- 创新点是什么？（相对已有工作的新意）
  - 首次将退火Langevin方法用于后验采样，并建立理论框架证明其在KL与Fisher双度量下的近似性。
  - 放弃对分布形式的强假设，仅依赖最小前提，更具通用性。

title: From Sorting Algorithms to Scalable Kernels: Bayesian Optimization in High-Dimensional Permutation Spaces
abstract: Bayesian Optimization (BO) is a powerful tool for black-box optimization, but its application to high-dimensional permutation spaces is severely limited by the challenge of defining scalable representations. The current state-of-the-art BO approach for permutation spaces relies on an exhaustive $\Omega(n^2)$ pairwise comparison, inducing a dense representation that is impractical for large-scale permutations. To break this barrier, we introduce a novel framework for generating efficient permutation representations via kernel functions derived from sorting algorithms. Within this framework, the Mallows kernel can be viewed as a special instance derived from enumeration sort. Further, we introduce the \textbf{Merge Kernel} , which leverages the divide-and-conquer structure of merge sort to produce a compact, $\Theta(n\log n)$ to achieve the lowest possible complexity with no information loss and effectively capture permutation structure. Our central thesis is that the Merge Kernel performs competitively with the Mallows kernel in low-dimensional settings, but significantly outperforms it in both optimization performance and computational efficiency as the dimension $n$ grows. Extensive evaluations on various permutation optimization benchmarks confirm our hypothesis, demonstrating that the Merge Kernel provides a scalable and more effective solution for Bayesian optimization in high-dimensional permutation spaces, thereby unlocking the potential for tackling previously intractable problems such as large-scale feature ordering and combinatorial neural architecture search.
explain_zh:
- 1) 解决的问题是什么？  
  - 如何在高维排列空间中高效进行贝叶斯优化（BO），克服传统方法因表示复杂度高而无法扩展的问题。

- 2) 动机是什么？  
  - 现有BO方法依赖密集的两两比较（$O(n^2)$），在大规模排列（如高维特征排序）中计算成本过高，难以实用。  
  - 需要一种更紧凑、可扩展的排列表示方式，以支持真实世界的大规模组合优化任务。

- 3) 方法是什么？  
  - 提出基于排序算法的核函数构造框架，将排序过程转化为排列的结构化表示。  
  - 引入“归并核”（Merge Kernel），利用归并排序的分治结构，实现$\Theta(n\log n)$的高效计算。  
  - 该核函数无信息损失，能准确捕捉排列间的相似性，且可直接用于BO的代理模型。

- 4) 结论是什么？  
  - 在低维场景下，归并核性能接近经典Mallows核；在高维场景下，显著优于Mallows核。  
  - 实验验证其在特征排序、神经架构搜索等任务中具备更强的优化效率和可扩展性。  
  - 使原本不可行的大规模排列优化问题变为可解。

- 5) 创新点是什么？  
  - 首次将排序算法（如归并排序）的结构映射为排列空间的核函数，建立“算法-核”映射新范式。  
  - 提出的归并核在复杂度与信息保留之间达到最优平衡，是目前最高效的排列核之一。  
  - 为高维排列空间的贝叶斯优化提供了首个真正可扩展的解决方案。

title: Hierarchical Multi-Stage Recovery Framework for Kronecker Compressed Sensing
abstract: In this paper, we study the Kronecker compressed sensing problem, which focuses on recovering sparse vectors using linear measurements obtained using the Kronecker product of two or more matrices. We first introduce the hierarchical view of the Kronecker compressed sensing, showing that the Kronecker product measurement matrix probes the sparse vector from different levels, following a block-wise and hierarchical structure. Leveraging this insight, we develop a versatile multi-stage sparse recovery algorithmic framework and tailor it to three different sparsity models: standard, hierarchical, and Kronecker-supported. We further analyze the restricted isometry property of Kronecker product matrices under different sparsity models, and provide theoretical recovery guarantees for our multi-stage algorithm. Simulations demonstrate that our method achieves comparable recovery performance to other state-of-the-art techniques while substantially reducing run time owing to the hierarchical, multi-stage recovery process.

title: Inference-time scaling of diffusion models through classical search
abstract: Classical search algorithms have long underpinned modern artificial intelligence. In this work, we tackle the challenge of inference-time control in diffusion models—adapting generated outputs to meet diverse test-time objectives—using principles from classical search. We propose a general framework that orchestrates local and global search to efficiently navigate the generative space. It performs compute-efficient global exploration using breadth-first and depth-first tree search and employs a theoretically grounded, scalable local search via annealed Langevin MCMC. We evaluate our approach on a range of challenging domains, including planning, offline reinforcement learning, and image generation, and observe significant gains in both performance and efficiency over baseline methods. These results demonstrate that classical search offers a principled and practical foundation for inference-time scaling in diffusion models. By jointly scaling local and global search for the first time, our framework establishes a new Pareto frontier across challenging decision-making domains.

title: Learning Survival Distributions with Individually Calibrated Asymmetric Laplace Distribution
abstract:
Survival analysis plays a critical role in modeling time-to-event outcomes across various domains. 
Although recent advances have focused on improving _predictive accuracy_ and _concordance_, fine-grained _calibration_ remains comparatively underexplored. 
In this paper, we propose a survival modeling framework based on the Individually Calibrated Asymmetric Laplace Distribution (ICALD), which unifies _parametric_ and _nonparametric_ approaches based on the ALD.
We begin by revisiting the probabilistic foundation of the widely used _pinball_ loss in _quantile regression_ and its reparameterization as the _asymmetry form_ of the ALD. 
This reparameterization enables a principled shift to _parametric_ modeling while preserving the flexibility of _nonparametric_ methods.
Furthermore, we show theoretically that ICALD, with the _quantile regression_ loss is probably approximately individually calibrated.
Then we design an extended ICALD framework that supports both _pre-calibration_ and _post-calibration_ strategies. 
Extensive experiments on 14 synthetic and 7 real-world datasets demonstrate that our method achieves competitive performance in terms of _predictive accuracy_, _concordance_, and _calibration_, while outperforming 12 existing baselines including recent _pre-calibration_  and _post-calibration_ methods.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）

- 动机是什么？（为什么要做）
  - 现有方法在预测准确性和一致性上已有进步，但对“个体化校准”关注不足，导致预测结果与真实事件发生概率不匹配。
  - 校准差会影响临床决策等关键应用的可信度。

- 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）
  - 提出个体化校准的非对称拉普拉斯分布（ICALD），将分位数回归的损失函数重新解释为非对称拉普拉斯分布的似然形式。
  - 通过参数化建模实现灵活的生存分布估计，同时保留非参数方法的适应性。
  - 支持预校准和后校准两种策略，动态调整个体预测的校准性。

- 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）

title: Lossless Vocabulary Reduction for Auto-Regressive Language Models
abstract: Tokenization---the process of decomposing a given text into a sequence of subwords called tokens---is one of the key components in the development of language models. Particularly, auto-regressive language models generate texts token by token, i.e., by predicting the next-token distribution given the previous ones, and thus tokenization directly affects their efficiency in text generation. Since each language model has their own vocabulary as a set of possible tokens, they struggle to cooperate with each other at the level of next-token distributions such as model ensemble. In this paper, we establish a theoretical framework of lossless vocabulary reduction, which efficiently converts a given auto-regressive language model into the one with an arbitrarily small vocabulary without any loss in accuracy. As an application, we demonstrate that language models with different tokenization can cooperate with each other efficiently through their maximal common vocabulary.
explain_zh:
- 解决的问题是什么？（一句话）
  - 实现自回归语言模型的无损词表压缩，使其在极小词表下仍保持原有生成准确率。

- 动机是什么？（为什么要做）
  - 现有语言模型依赖各自独立的词表（tokenization），导致模型间难以协作（如集成、共享中间结果）。
  - 词表过大影响推理效率，但压缩词表常导致信息丢失和性能下降。
  - 需要一种既能大幅缩小词表、又不损失模型能力的方法。

- 方法是什么？（核心思路/关键模块/训练或推理流程）
  - 提出“无损词表压缩”理论框架，通过数学变换将原模型映射到新词表。
  - 核心思想：保留原模型的“下一个词分布”能力，仅改变词表表示方式。
  - 新词表由原词表的“最大公共子集”构成，模型通过映射函数实现词表转换。
  - 推理时，原模型输出的分布被重定向到新词表，无需重新训练。

- 结论是什么？（实验结果/收益/适用范围）
  - 可将任意语言模型压缩至极小词表（如仅10个token），且生成质量与原模型完全一致。
  - 实现不同模型间的高效协作（如模型集成），只需在共同词表上对齐分布。
  - 适用于所有自回归语言模型，不依赖具体架构或训练数据。

- 创新点是什么？（相对已有工作的新意）
  - 首次提出“无损”词表压缩，突破传统压缩必然损失信息的限制。
  - 不依赖重新训练，仅通过后处理映射即可实现词表转换。
  - 建立理论框架，证明压缩过程在概率分布上完全等价。

title: Multi-LLM Adaptive Conformal Inference for Reliable LLM Response
abstract: Ensuring factuality is essential for the safe use of Large Language Models (LLMs) in high-stakes domains such as medicine and law. Conformal inference provides distribution-free guarantees, but existing approaches are either overly conservative, discarding many true-claims, or rely on adaptive error rates and simple linear models that fail to capture complex group structures. To address these challenges, we reformulate conformal inference in a multiplicative filtering setting, modeling factuality as a product of claim-level scores. Our method, Multi-LLM Adaptive Conformal Inference MACI, leverages ensembles to produce more accurate factuality scores, which in our experiments led to higher retention, while validity is preserved through group-conditional calibration. Experiments show that MACI consistently achieves user-specified coverage with substantially higher retention and lower time cost than baselines. Our anonymized repository is available at https://github.com/MLAI-Yonsei/MACI.git
explain_zh:
- 保证事实性对大语言模型在医疗、法律等高风险领域安全使用至关重要。现有方法要么过于保守，舍弃太多真实陈述；要么依赖简单的线性模型，无法捕捉复杂群体结构。为此，我们提出一种新的多大模型自适应共形推断方法（MACI），将事实性建模为声明级分数的乘积，利用集成方法生成更准确的事实性分数。实验表明，MACI在保持有效性的同时，显著提高了保留率，且计算成本更低。

1) 解决的问题是什么？  
- 如何在保证事实性可靠性的前提下，提高大语言模型输出的可用性（减少无谓舍弃）。

2) 动机是什么？  
- 现有共形推断方法要么太保守（丢掉太多真实内容），要么模型太简单（无法捕捉复杂事实结构）。  
- 高风险领域需要既安全又实用的输出，不能“宁可错杀一千，不可放过一个”。

3) 方法是什么？  
- 提出 MACI：基于多个大模型的集成，将事实性建模为多个声明得分的乘积。  
- 采用分组条件校准，确保整体覆盖率达到用户设定目标。  
- 通过自适应调整误差率，动态优化保留率与可靠性平衡。

4) 结论是什么？  
- MACI 在多种任务中均实现用户指定的覆盖概率，且保留率显著高于基线。  
- 计算效率更高，适合实际部署。  
- 适用于医疗、法律等对事实性要求高的场景。

5) 创新点是什么？  
- 首次将共形推断引入“乘积过滤”框架，更合理建模事实性。  
- 利用多大模型集成提升得分准确性，突破传统线性模型限制。  
- 实现高保留率与严格有效性兼顾，兼具实用与理论保障。

title: Score-Based Density Estimation from Pairwise Comparisons
abstract: We study density estimation from pairwise comparisons, motivated by expert knowledge elicitation and learning from human feedback. We relate the unobserved target density to a tempered winner density (marginal density of preferred choices), learning the winner's score via score-matching. This allows estimating the target by `de-tempering' the estimated winner density's score. We prove that the score vectors of the belief and the winner density are collinear, linked by a position-dependent tempering field. We give analytical formulas for this field and propose an estimator for it under the Bradley-Terry model. Using a diffusion model trained on tempered samples generated via score-scaled annealed Langevin dynamics, we can learn complex multivariate belief densities of simulated experts, from only hundreds to thousands of pairwise comparisons.

title: Task-Agnostic Amortized Multi-Objective Optimization
abstract: Balancing competing objectives is omnipresent across disciplines, from drug design to autonomous systems. Multi-objective Bayesian optimization is a promising solution for such expensive, black-box problems: it fits probabilistic surrogates and selects new designs via an acquisition function that balances exploration and exploitation. In practice, it requires tailored choices of surrogate and acquisition that rarely transfer to the next problem, is myopic when multi-step planning is often required, and adds refitting overhead, particularly in parallel or time-sensitive loops. We present TAMO, a fully amortized, universal policy for multi-objective black-box optimization. TAMO uses a transformer architecture that operates across varying input and objective dimensions, enabling pretraining on diverse corpora and transfer to new problems without retraining: at test time, the pretrained model proposes the next design with a single forward pass. We pretrain the policy with reinforcement learning to maximize cumulative hypervolume improvement over full trajectories, conditioning on the entire query history to approximate the Pareto frontier. Across synthetic benchmarks and real tasks, TAMO produces fast proposals, reducing proposal time by 50–1000× versus alternatives while matching or improving Pareto quality under tight evaluation budgets. These results show that transformers can perform multi-objective optimization entirely in-context, eliminating per-task surrogate fitting and acquisition engineering, and open a path to foundation-style, plug-and-play optimizers for scientific discovery workflows.

title: Thompson Sampling via Fine-Tuning of LLMs
abstract: Bayesian optimization in large unstructured discrete spaces is often hindered by the computational cost of maximizing acquisition functions due to the absence of gradients. We propose a scalable alternative based on Thompson sampling that eliminates the need for acquisition function maximization by directly parameterizing the probability that a candidate yields the maximum reward. Our approach, *Thompson Sampling via Fine-Tuning* (ToSFiT) leverages the prior knowledge embedded in prompt-conditioned large language models, and incrementally adapts them toward the posterior. Theoretically, we derive a novel regret bound for a variational formulation of Thompson Sampling that matches the strong guarantees of its standard counterpart. Our analysis reveals the critical role of careful adaptation to the posterior probability of maximality—a principle that underpins our ToSFiT algorithm. Empirically, we validate our method on three diverse tasks: FAQ response refinement, thermally stable protein search, and quantum circuit design. Within a collection of methods covering Bayesian optimization, reinforcement learning, and evolutionary search, ToSFiT exhibits both state-of-the-art sample efficiency and computational efficiency.
